description:
Due to a "glitch" in versioning upstream, all packages following version 1.35.1100 will
    not be available as "newest" package in chocolatey. To counter this, a new package "cleanmgr-plus" was created.
    As of now this package is deprecated and cleanmgr-plus is the new package.
summary: Cleanmgr+ is a portable app that builds upon the Microsoft Disk Clean-up Tool (Cleanmgr.exe) by adding additional features and deleting more junk than the Disk Clean-up Tool.
author: Mirinsoft
